title: Stop Writing Tone Instructions. Layer Them. - Isadora Martin-Dye, Isadora & Co
summary: Isadora Martin-Dye presents a four-layer architecture for maintaining consistent brand voice in AI systems: immutable identity, situational mode, example-anchored voice, and deterministic post-generation veto. The approach is grounded in production deployments across wedding venue, personal AI companion, and family-crisis applications.
writeup: Isadora Martin-Dye lays out a four-layer architecture for keeping brand voice consistent in AI systems, replacing flat tone instructions with stacked components: an immutable identity layer, a situational mode layer, an example-anchored voice layer, and a deterministic post-generation veto that filters output after it is produced. The structure separates what never changes from what shifts by context, and pairs generation-time prompting with a final deterministic check. The design draws on production deployments across wedding venue, personal AI companion, and family-crisis applications, tying the method to character consistency, access control, and post-generation filtering.
